codeSystems.name: SearchScopeCS
codeSystems.title: Search Scope CodeSystem
codeSystems.description:
Valid locations within a FHIR Search Result where resources are found.
Used by ViewJoinMap to specify where to look for pivot and joined resources.

codeSystems.name: ViewTypeCS
codeSystems.title: UI Component Types
codeSystems.description:
Formal codes for identifying UI component factories in the KMP ViewRegistry.
Each code maps to a registered ComponentRenderer that knows how to render
a specific FHIR-derived view state on screen.
